PreToolUse.description: Inject PLUGIN_ROOT and PROJECT_ROOT when Claude auto-invokes a bridgic command via the Skill tool. NOTE: an `if: "Skill(AmphiLoop:*)"` engine-level gate would be ideal, but the Skill tool has no documented permission-rule specifier syntax — the engine evaluator returns false for any `Skill(...)` pattern and the hook never fires (verified via debug log). Cross-plugin filtering is therefore enforced inside inject-command-paths.sh by the strict `case "$SKILL_NAME" in "AmphiLoop":*)` branch.

UserPromptSubmit.description: Inject PLUGIN_ROOT and PROJECT_ROOT when the user types a bridgic slash command directly
